requirements.remaining_gap: This behavior is part of the connection-migration/last-valid-path policy and still needs a connection-state machine to decide when connection state may be discarded.
requirements.notes: The helper layer can already model anti-amplification and address validation, but not the full discard policy in Section 10.

requirements.remaining_gap: This behavior is part of the connection-migration/last-valid-path policy and still needs a connection-state machine to decide when connection state may be discarded.

The new idle-timeout helper computes the PTO floor and advertised timeout minimum without requiring connection orchestration.

requirements.remaining_gap: This behavior needs a connection lifecycle manager that can actually terminate and discard the connection state rather than only report timeout expiry.
requirements.notes: The new helper can detect expiry, but the repo still lacks a connection-level close/discard path.
Transport-parameter round-tripping already existed; the helper closes the effective-timeout calculation that the codec alone could not express.

requirements.remaining_gap: This behavior needs a connection lifecycle manager that can actually terminate and discard the connection state rather than only report timeout expiry.
requirements.notes: The new helper can detect expiry, but the repo still lacks a connection-level close/discard path.
The new helper state restarts its deadline when peer traffic is processed successfully.
The new helper state restarts its deadline on the first ack-eliciting send after the last received peer packet.
This requirement is the same PTO floor rule as S10P1-0001 in a different extracted statement and is covered by the same helper test.
PING formatting and ack-eliciting classification already existed; the trace update makes the existing coverage explicit for this chunk.

notes: No reconciliation artifact existed for this chunk, so it was treated as greenfield. Idle-timeout floor/restart behavior is now covered by a helper state type and existing transport-parameter / ping-wire coverage, but close/draining lifecycle work remains blocked by the missing connection-state machine and CONNECTION_CLOSE wire support.
